website_scope.title: Regionally node-positive MIBC (cN1–N3, cM0)
website_scope.includes: Muscle-invasive bladder cancer with involved pelvic lymph nodes and no distant metastases. Systemic therapy before possible cystectomy or radiation.
website_scope.clinical_label: Regionally node-positive MIBC: cN1 cM0, curative-intent systemic therapy first

label: Target clinical profile
treatment_intent: Perioperative systemic therapy before possible radical cystectomy
geography_context: Czech oncology — compare against EAU/NCCN cisplatin NAC standard
key_questions: Is perioperative EV+pembrolizumab justified vs standard cisplatin NAC?
How many trial patients actually match cN1 cM0 perioperative MIBC?
What is the approved alternative (NIAGARA) and its cN1 subgroup data?
What adjuvant options apply if surgery still shows pN+?

eligible.standard: Neoadjuvant gemcitabine/cisplatin or ddMVAC → RC (SWOG 8710 evidence base, N0 RCTs)
eligible.approved_io: NIAGARA: perioperative durvalumab + GC → RC + adjuvant durvalumab
